USD is canonical.

Recalculates allowances for the selected plan. Token usage and model are kept as observed.

All costs are estimates based on currently available Copilot session metrics, published model pricing, and selected plan assumptions. Usage-based billing is forward-looking until GitHub's transition takes effect. See GitHub's model pricing docs.
